---
title: "Mongolia Land Degradation Risk Application"
title-block-banner: images/banner1.jpg
title-block-banner-color: "#faf6ed"
---

# Project Summary

Fill in the sections below to provide a brief summary of your project. Each section should have no more than 100 words. Do not edit any of the headings.

## Problem Statement

What is the problem you’re trying to address using this application?

## End User

Who are you building this application for? How does it address a need this community has?

## Data

```{=html}
<table class="data-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Category</th>
      <th>Dataset</th>
      <th>Description</th>
      <th>Source</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td rowspan="5" class="category-cell">GEE</td>
      <td>Elevation / Slope</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">NASA SRTM Digital Elevation Model (30m)</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Land Cover</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">MODIS Land Cover Type (2020)</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Hydrology</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">WWF HydroSHEDS Flow Accumulation</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Soil Texture</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">OpenLandMap Soil Texture Class (USDA System)</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Soil Type</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">OpenLandMap Clay Content</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td rowspan="4" class="category-cell">Other</td>
      <td>Historical Landslides</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">Official reported landslide incident points (2011–2025)</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Census Population</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">Official Population per District, 2021 Census</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Country Boundary</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">Official boundary layer</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>District Boundaries</td>
      <td class="desc-cell">Official boundaries of all districts</td>
      <td><a href="#">Link</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Methodology

How are you using this data to address the problem?

## Interface

How does your application's interface work to address the needs of your end user?

# The Application

Replace the link below with the link to your application.

::: column-page
<iframe src="https://rs-and-bsabd.projects.earthengine.app/view/mongolia-land-degradation-fast" width="100%" height="700px">

</iframe>
:::

# How it Works

Use this section to explain how your application works using code blocks and text explanations (no more than 500 words excluding code):

``` js
Map.setCenter(35.51898, 33.90153, 15);

Map.setOptions("satellite");

var aoi = ee.Geometry.Point(35.51898, 33.90153).buffer(3000);
```

You can include images:

![Pixelwise T-Test, 2018](images/beirut_change_2020.jpg)

and math: $$ \Large t = {\frac{\overline{x_1}-\overline{x_2}} {\sqrt{\frac{s^2_1}{n_1} + \frac{s^2_2}{n_2}}}} $$

## Data Pro-precessing

text

## Data Analysis

text

## Interactive Visualization

text

## Insights and Objectives

text

## Limitations

text

# References

-   xxxx
